steps.title: Read the coefficients
steps.content: In $12x+18y=96$, the coefficient $12$ is the number of hours for each in-person workshop, and the coefficient $18$ is the number of hours for each remote workshop.

steps.title: Find the difference
steps.content:
Subtract the in-person workshop length from the remote workshop length.
$$18-12=6$$
The answer is 6.
